message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle bold
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantCornerRadius 0
skinparam participantShape rectangle
skinparam participantShapeStyle rectangle
skinparam participantShapeColor #000000
skinparam participantShapeBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantShapeFontColor #000000
skinparam participantShapeFontSize 14
skinparam participantShapeFontStyle bold
skinparam participantShapePadding 10
skinparam participantShapeMargin 10
skinparam participantShapeBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantShapeShadowing false
skinparam participantShapeCornerRadius 0

participant "Executor" as Executor
participant "Reactor" as Reactor

Executor -> Reactor: 当前类型为pending
note right of Executor: 轮询其他future
Reactor -> Executor: 执行对于的wake方法将Future的状态变为就绪（Ready）

@enduml
